name: Append to Lattice Vector
description: Appends an element to a vector in the user's workspace ('w') or operations ('o') namespace. Path must start with 'w/' or 'o/' (e.g. 'w/events', 'w/agent-data/logs'). If the path does not exist, a new single-element vector is created. If the path contains a vector, the element is appended. Deeper paths are supported — intermediate maps are created as needed. Errors if the target path contains a non-vector value. Returns {appended: true} on success.

path.description: Path to the vector to append to, e.g. 'w/events' or 'w/agent-data/logs'. Must start with 'w/' or 'o/'.

value.description: The element to append. You should normally use structured values rather than serialised strings.

appended.description: True if the element was appended successfully
